title: Cisco security advisory (AV26-357)
description: On April 15, 2026, Cisco published security advisories to address vulnerabilities in the following products. Included were critical updates for the following:
products: Cisco Identity Services Engine (ISE)  multiple versions
Cisco ISE Passive Identity Connector (ISE-PIC)  multiple versions
Cisco Webex Services (cloud-based, configured to use SSO integration with Control Hub)
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
